UltraGrid 1.9.12 (tags/v1.9.12 rev 669a27d built Oct 21 2025 08:09:11)

[PortAudio] Using PortAudio V19.7.0-devel, revision 147dd722548358763a8b649b3e4b41dfffbcfbb6
PortAudio capture usage:
	-s portaudio[:<index>[:latency=<l>]]
or
	-s portaudio[:device=<dev>][:latency=<l>]

options:
	 <l> 	suggested latency in sec (experimental, use in case of problems)
	<dev>	device name (or a part of it); device index is also accepted here

Available PortAudio capture devices:
	portaudio - use default Portaudio device (marked with star)
	portaudio:0 - NDI Audio (output channels: 0; input channels: 2; Core Audio)
	portaudio:1 - BlackHole 16ch (output channels: 16; input channels: 16; Core Audio)
	portaudio:2 - BlackHole 2ch (output channels: 2; input channels: 2; Core Audio)
	portaudio:3 - BlackHole 64ch (output channels: 64; input channels: 64; Core Audio)
(*) 	portaudio:4 - MacBook Pro Microphone (output channels: 0; input channels: 1; Core Audio)
	portaudio:6 - Microsoft Teams Audio (output channels: 1; input channels: 1; Core Audio)
	portaudio:8 - ZoomAudioDevice (output channels: 2; input channels: 2; Core Audio)
	portaudio:9 - Hauptgeraet (output channels: 16; input channels: 16; Core Audio)
Exit
